tung tung tung sahur!  🥁
Its sound resembles that of a beating drum, "tung tung tung." It was first discovered at Pentungan Sahur Pos Ronda Malam. 🌍
Although people mistaken it for an “Italian Brainrot Animal,” it's actually Indonesian Brainrot 💭
Sahur is known for wielding a signature wooden bat and can evolve into a second form, as seen in his fight with Brr brr Patapim. He is one of the most well known and most beloved brain rot characters, claiming many peoples top 1 spot in the unique rankings of brainrot animals 🏆
